title: Bath Soak Bundle - Cussons Creations: Peony & Cherry Blossom, Fearless Fever, Vanilla & Shea Butter, Space Candy & Coconut Cream with Papa Lima Body Puff
features: Cussons Creations Bath Soak Bundle: Includes Peony & Cherry Blossom, Fearless Fever, Vanilla & Shea Butter, Space Candy & Coconut Cream.
Fearless Fever (500ml): A sweet vanilla sugar and whipped cream. This bath soak leaves your skin feeling clean and soft.
Peony & Cherry Blossom (500ml): Fragrant floral soak with gentle cleansers for soft, revitalised skin.
To The Moon and Back (500ml): Cosmic bath adventure with Space Candy and coconut scents, ensuring smooth skin.
Vanilla & Shea Butter (500ml): Sweet vanilla and shea butter soak for silky, nourished skin.
PETA Approved: All products are animal-friendly and not tested on animals.
description: Product description Indulge in the ultimate bathing experience with the Papa Lima Bath Soak Bundle by Cussons Creations. This luxurious set includes four exquisite bath soaks - Peony & Cherry Blossom, Fearless Fever, Vanilla & Shea Butter, and Space Candy & Coconut Cream - each designed to transform your bath time into a serene escape. The bundle also comes with a body puff, making it the perfect addition to your self-care routine. Each soak is crafted with gentle cleansers to leave your skin feeling clean, soft, and pampered. Peony & Cherry Blossom offers a blooming paradise, while Fearless Fever brings a sweet vanilla sugar and whipped cream scent. Vanilla & Shea Butter provides a cosy cocoon of indulgence, and Space Candy & Coconut Cream takes you on a cosmic adventure. All products are proudly PETA-approved, ensuring they are cruelty-free and animal-friendly. Elevate your bath game with these delightful soaks, where every bath is a celebration of fragrant, skin-loving joy. Directions Fill bath with water, ensure water temperature is comfortable. After filling, add bathwater additive to the water and disperse it. Avoid contact with natural stone or stainless steel. Safety Warning As with all cleansers, if the product gets into eyes, rinse well with water. Avoid contact with natural stone or stainless steel. It may cause staining. This product is intended for human use only, please do not use on animals. See more
